title: Chapter II: Switchback Ridge

region.name: Switchback Ridge
region.summary: A steep mountain region where downhill control, hairpins, and traction discipline dominate.
region.theme: descent control, hairpins, and surface grip

submap.name: Hairpin Shelf
submap.summary: A narrow shelf road with switchbacks, fog pockets, and cliff-edge guardrails.

source: Expanded in Spark 2 from chatgpt_conv.md and the Road Master roadmap.
authoringNotes: Keep the ridge severe: slope, traction, and speed control should feel consequential.
Use the same trap names in questions, explanations, and boss lines.
Favor short, concrete recoveries over generic safety advice.
